scripts.playtest:build: pnpm exec rbxtsc && mkdir -p build && rojo build test.project.json -o build/physics-controller-test.rbxl
scripts.test:integration: pnpm exec rbxtsc && mkdir -p build && rojo build test.project.json -o build/physics-controller-test.rbxl && run-in-roblox --place build/physics-controller-test.rbxl --script test/run-in-roblox.luau
